99: Thus did full many of us lay down our lives to seal away our king when they were corrupted by light! If we do as you ask, our sacrifice would have been in vain!
Thus did full many of us lay down our lives to seal away our king when they were corrupted by Light! If we do as you ask, our sacrifice would have been in vain!

107: Honored Elder, pray believe me when I say that this <If(PlayerParameter(4))>woman<Else/>man</If> is possessed not only of the strength required to vanquish the king, but of something still more valuable: a means to resist the resultant corruption. Indeed, <If(PlayerParameter(4))>she<Else/>he</If> hath already laid low the Lightwarden of Lakeland, all without succumbing to the influence of its light.
